sections.title: Build PAK va dua vao game
sections.description: Sau khi dich xong: build runtime BTXT/BMD, dong goi PAK va copy PAK vao folder game.

actions.label: Build english.win.btxt
actions.summary: Patch embeddedstrings vao file english.win.btxt.

actions.label: Xem truoc BTXT expanded pilot
actions.summary: Validate va tinh size delta cho 5-10 text pilot, khong ghi file output.

actions.label: Build BTXT expanded pilot
actions.summary: Rebuild BTXT co tinh lai vung string data cho scope pilot 5-10 text.

actions.label: Workflow BTXT pilot an toan
actions.summary: Chay dry-run truoc, sau do build expanded BTXT; khong copy vao game.

actions.label: Build + copy BTXT pilot
actions.summary: Chay dry-run, build, roi backup/copy rieng english.win.btxt va englishau.win.btxt vao game.
actions.coverage: Deployment local BTXT expanded da khoanh vung

actions.label: Build cac file .win.bmd
actions.summary: Patch subtitle, mission, item va RTS XML vao cac file .win.bmd runtime.

actions.label: Build BTXT + BMD
actions.summary: Chay build-btxt va build-bmd lien tiep.

actions.label: Dong goi gamedata.pak
actions.summary: Dong goi output runtime vao output/paks/gamedata.pak.
actions.coverage: PAK viet hoa san sang test

actions.label: Build game PAK
actions.summary: Build BTXT, BMD va dong goi PAK trong mot lenh.
actions.coverage: PAK viet hoa san sang copy vao game

actions.label: Copy PAK vao game
actions.summary: Backup PAK goc, vo hieu loose mod folder va copy output/paks vao thu muc Game.
actions.coverage: Deployment local de test trong game

actions.label: Copy chi BTXT language
actions.summary: Backup va copy rieng english.win.btxt/englishau.win.btxt de test scope runtime text.

actions.label: Rollback output gan nhat
actions.summary: Khoi phuc cac file output tu backup gan nhat neu build/dich co van de.

sections.title: Font va UI patch
sections.description: Cong cu patch font/UI khi can fix hien thi tieng Viet trong menu, popup va HUD.

actions.label: Build font body SWF
actions.summary: Tao file font body de UI co the dung glyph tieng Viet.

actions.label: Build UI aliases
actions.summary: Tao cac file alias SWF cho UI runtime.

actions.label: Patch font Cluster A
actions.summary: Patch frontend/menu confirmation cluster sang font viet hoa.

actions.label: Patch font Cluster B
actions.summary: Patch gameplay pause/alert/menu cluster sang glyph Arial.

actions.label: Patch font Cluster C
actions.summary: Patch journal va stats cluster sang glyph tieng Viet.

sections.title: Test va chan doan
sections.description: Dung khi can thu nghiem nhanh mot gia thuyet hoac kiem tra output cu the.

actions.label: Kiem tra font audit
actions.summary: Quet cac asset font/UI de xem noi nao dang embed/import font.

actions.label: Test XML menu
actions.summary: Thu nghiem thay doi menu XML nhanh de debug.

actions.label: Test BTXT
actions.summary: Thu patch nho english.win.btxt de kiem tra pipeline text.

actions.label: Test font file
actions.summary: Thu copy font vao output de test glyph tieng Viet.

actions.label: Test GFX font
actions.summary: Thu patch nhanh font vao class3_frontend.gfx.
